verses.text: Uzziah' tapa Jotham, Jotham' tapa Ahaz ahi Judah kumpipa' hun laitakin, Syria kumpipa Rezin leh Remaliah' tapa Pekah ahi Israel kumpipa, Jerusalem khuapi a sim dingin kuanto uh a, ahih hangin amaute in zo zolo uh hi
“Syria-te pen Efraim mite tawh kikop,” ci-in David' innkuante tungah a kigen ciangin, huih in gamlaka singte a mut bangin amah leh a mihingte' lungsim kiling hi
Topa in Isaiah tungah, “Ahaz tawh kimu dingin Puansawppa' nasepna phual zuatna lampi kiangah a om, bual tungnung tuilakna mongah nang leh na tapa Shearjashub pai-in
ama tungah, ‘Kidawm in la, om khinkhian in. Lau kei in. Syria kumpipa Rezin leh Remaliah' tapa' hehna pen, sing tumbang nih a khute tawh kibang lel ahih manin na lung gimsak kei in
Bang hang hiam cih leh Syria kumpi-a kipan Remaliah' tapa leh Efraim mite in nang hong sawm uh a
“Judah gam a sim dingin pai-in va sugawp ni; eima-a' dingin va zo ni; tua gamah kumpi dingin Tabeel' tapa va koih ni,” ci uh hi
Ahi zongin Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Tua thu pen kiplo ding a, hong tunglo ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Syria' lutang, Damaskas khuapi hi a, Damaskas' lutang, Rezin ahi hi. (Kum sawmguk leh kum nga sungin minam ahizo nawnlo zah dongin Efraim kitamzan gawp ding hi
Efraim' lutang, Samaria hi a, Samaria' lutang, Remaliah' tapa ahi hi. Hih thu upna kho na neih kei leh, nang na kip kei ding hi,’ va ci in,” ci-in a gen hi.
Topa in Ahaz kiangah thu genkik a
“ Topa na Pasian kiang panin lim khat ngen in la, a thuk Leinuai pan ahi a, a sang vantung panin ahi zongin ngen in,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin Ahaz in, “Ka ngen kei ding hi; Topa ka ze-et kei ding hi,” ci hi
Tua ciangin Isaiah in, “David' innkuan aw, ngai un! Mite na lunggim sakna uh kicing salo a, ka Pasian zong lunggimsak lai na hi uh hiam
Tua ahih ciangin Topa mahmah in note tungah lim khat hong pia ding hi. En un, nungak khat gai-in tapa khat nei ding a, ama min Immanuel kici ding hi
Amah in a hoihlote nialin a hoihte a teel theih hun ciangin bawngnawi thaukhal leh khuaizu ne ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh naupang in a hoihlote nialin a hoihte a teel theih hun ma-in na kihtak uh kumpi nihte' gam kinusiacip ding hi
Efraim mite pen Judah mite' kiang panin a paikhiat huna kipan nidangin a piang ngeilo thu, Assiria kumpipa pen nang leh na mite leh na pate' inn-ah Topa in hong tungsak ding hi
“Tua ni ciangin Egypt luite' nakah a om Egypt mite, thopi hon bangin hong paina ding leh Assiria mite, a gam panun khuaipi hon bangin hong paina dingun Topa in sam ding hi
Tuate khempeuh hong pai-in, keenhawmte sung, suangpi heengte sung, lingkung kawmte, leh ganhing tatna mun khempeuhah dim ding uh hi
“Tua ni ciangin Topa in Gun gal khat panin a kikawm temta ahi Assiria kumpipa tawh sam leh khemul mettol ding a, khamul zong metkhia ding hi
“Tua ni ciangin mi khat in bawngla khat leh tuu nih bang bek suahtakzo ding a
ahi zongin tuate in nawi tampi a piakna hangin amah in bawngnawi thaukhal ne zo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh gamsungah a omlai mi khempeuh in bawngnawi thaukhal leh khuaizu ne ding uh hi
“Tua ni ciangin nguntang tul khat a man leenggui tul khat a omna mun khempeuh pen lingkungte leh lingte' omna suak ding hi
Gam khempeuh lingkungte leh lingte tawh kidim ding ahih manin, thal leh thaltangte tawh tua munah mihingte gam vak ding uh hi
Lingkungte leh lingte na kihtakna hangin tupeek tawh a kikho ngei mual neute-ah na pai ngam kei ding hi. Tua munte pen bawng khahna leh tuute' gamtatna mun suak ding hi,” a ci hi.
